title: Existence Community Panorama Pack
description: Panoramas from past Existence Community worlds
body:
A [Vistas](https://modrinth.com/mod/vistas) resource pack featuring panoramas from past [Existence Community](https://existencesmp.com/) worlds, now including Community Server 2

![Community Server 2 Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FyBzizaw/images/8ee20529d7ce6525f605533526f88367b852a1e3.png)
